cards.title: The HB1000 OS — the whole model
cards.caption: A diamond split by the equator: vision above, HB1000 (human + AI) at the centre, service rings + Dingo ‘buildings’ below.

cards.title: Inside a Dingo Card
cards.caption: A 5×5 of 25 activity squares, PTK at the centre, a ticker-tape of red/yellow/green KPIs, 80/20 human-vs-agent.

cards.title: Cash-Out Assignment — before → after
cards.caption: Manager 100% by hand → the agent does ~80%, finds the air, the manager approves and goes home.

cards.title: Where to point the build — gated by human adoption
cards.caption: Build is free; human adoption is the only scarce resource. Build many lanes in parallel; protect the prime (Pawn Princess).

cards.title: DECIDED — what we build next, in parallel
cards.caption: Protect the cash-out prime. Build-ahead now (zero load): Dingo Card layer + Stage-2 engine + rails. Next adoption = Stage-2 with Samantha.

cards.title: BUILT — the Dingo Card, live & data-driven
cards.caption: PP-01's card rendered from sample-card.json: vivid vision + WIIFM up top, ticker-tape KPIs, 5×5 with PTK at the heart, 80/20 roll-up = Caller 32% · AI 68%. Drop in real data and any store's card lights up.

cards.title: BUILT — Stage-2 catches what the drawer can't
cards.caption: Next-day bank reconciliation (Samantha's lane): clean deposit RECONCILES; a $40 that balanced last night but never hit the bank ESCALATES; a duplicated card line flags a $240 over-settlement. Tests passing on the real venv. Read-only — never moves money.

cards.title: NEW LANE — Door-to-Door Occupancy Drive
cards.caption: Same engine, new JSON: PTK = '85% occupancy today'. Agent does the lists/scripts/follow-up/reporting; the rep knocks & closes (roll-up auto-shifts to Caller 39% · AI 61%). Early draft — superseded by the Seba Hub Occupancy Engine card.

cards.title: SEBA HUB — the Occupancy Engine (lanes + intent engine in one card)
cards.caption: Marries both asks: the TOP 12 squares are real occupancy lanes we already own (wedding venue, midweek gap, RV/cabins/geodomes/bunkies/insta-cabins, summer camp ≤500, driving range, propane = 0 local competitors, treasure hunt, festival ≤5,000 tix). The BOTTOM squares are the Intent Harvesting Engine that fills them: SENSE → SCORE → ROUTE (Golden Age fleet) → DRAFT → human approve → CONNECT → OFFER → OUTCOME → LEARN + Trust ledger. PTK = no empty night, no empty seat. Caller TBD; Casey/Murphy/Thomas scope the lanes.

cards.title: THE GOLDEN AGE FLEET — your routing library (from ChatGPT, now in the repo)
cards.caption: All 10 trust archetypes the engine routes to: Fuller Brush (give first), Avon (neighbor trust), Route Man (be there at the moment of need), Tupperware (community proof), Kirby (proof/demo), Electrolux (professional calm), Family Future (protect tomorrow), Southwestern (territory math), Mary Kay (recognition/dignity), Network Builder (law of 250). Each card carries its shadow side / abuses + the existential risk if AI gets it wrong — the conscience layer.

cards.title: TWO PARALLEL TRACKS — midweek groups + weekend individuals, one engine
cards.caption: 85% needs BOTH (weekends are only 2 of 7 nights), season is 3 months / day 8 → run both now. TRACK A: group ORGANIZERS (gold ★, 'fills 10–50 beds') → midweek blocks, rescue-register draft, needs the human close. TRACK B: INDIVIDUALS → weekend nights, mostly SELF-SERVE (draft hands them a booking link, ~0 human time). The human closer's attention is value-sorted (organizers first); individuals self-close, so running both isn't double the work. Channel gate green-only; red_individual_private = content only, no override. Draft-only throughout.

cards.title: JUNE 10 - THE ESTATE AUDIT - every vault of Tim's IP, accounted for
cards.html:
Where Tim's life work lives, verified one by one:
✅ This computer + OneDrive (15k+ files)
✅ GitHub - 50+ repos incl. ChatGPT & Claude archives
✅ Cowork + Claude Code sessions (every transcript searchable)
✅ Gmail + Outlook (mailbox readable back to 2025)
✅ Google Drive (connected, verified)
🔄 Manus Knowledge Library - push to GitHub instructed
🔄 Grok / Gemini / Replit (Aug-Sep 2025) - Fidel rescue email drafted
🔄 iPhone camera roll 2001-2026 - importing the 2026 gap right now

Nothing is lost. Everything has an address.
cards.caption: One session, every vault tested: disk, GitHub, Cowork, Claude Code, Gmail, Outlook, Drive, ChatGPT, Manus, the phone. What wasn't already captured now has a named rescue in flight.

cards.title: RESCUED - the 'lost' era (Jul-Dec 2025) found in Tim's Outlook
cards.html:
~300 emails read → 63 visionary emails identified → 7 concept files saved to Outlook-Rescue-2025\

The genealogy (nothing died - it evolved):
Seacan Founders Village (Aug) → Big Mama's Genius/Data Village (Sept) → CRAgent + Give Like a Billionaire (Oct) → team handoff (Nov) → the live Maven Portal (Dec)

Crown jewel: the Big Mama Master Build Prompt - full product spec rescued from a PDF attachment.
⚠ One live OpenAI API key found in an Oct 7 email - Tim to revoke + delete.
cards.caption: Tim anxiety-saved his concepts into email attachments through fall 2025, then feared they were gone. An agent read the era, split visionary IP from day-to-day, and filed it: INVENTORY.md (63 finds, click-to-open), concepts\ (full rescued text), ATTACHMENTS-TODO.md (20+ files to download).

cards.title: LIVE NOW - iPhone camera roll import (Dec 2025 - Jun 2026)
cards.html:
The iPhone is plugged in and the full camera roll is visible: every month from 2001 to June 2026.

The OneDrive archive already held everything through Dec 21, 2025 - so the import is filling the gap: 23 month-folders, Dec 2025 → Jun 2026, landing in OneDrive\Pictures\iPhone-Import-2026-06-10.

Progress: Dec (682) ✓ - Jan (551) ✓ - Feb (2,636) ✓ - March onward in flight...

Next: cross-reference Tim's concept-preserving screenshots against the rescued email concepts, by date.
cards.caption: Tim took screenshots to preserve ideas the way he emailed himself concepts - same anxiety, same gold. Once the photos land, each screenshot gets matched to its email-era concept so the visual + written record of every idea lives together.

cards.title: LIVE NOW - the Cloud Butterfly hunt: harvest DONE, registry building
cards.html:
The mystery solved: the "30" Tim saw = the Maven Innovation Index - butterflies that GRADUATED. The raw population: YTD 119 by Jan 23 alone - Tim's ~250 estimate is on target.

Harvested from every vault:
✅ Outlook: ~80 butterflies verbatim (+ the scoring system: Humanity/Business/Fun/WTH /400, THESIS + BAR STOOL)
✅ Disk: ~75 + the January registry pages
✅ GitHub: 65 files - the MASTER INDEX, daily DCB logs Dec 17-Apr 6, January Days 1-15 archives, Protocol v4.0, 17 Manus sessions

🔨 Registry builder running now - dedupe, restore Tim's numbering, score format, "resume the practice" template.

📷 Meanwhile: iPhone import at 5,426 files - March (2,055) copying...
cards.caption: Origin text found - The Seance (Verona, Feb 23, 3:33 AM): 'It''s like having a seance with your unconscious... Hunting we will go!' Top score so far: SEBA Influencer Bootcamp, 365/400.

cards.title: THE BIG ONE - the HB1000 Operating System is being built RIGHT NOW
cards.html:
Phase 1 COMPLETE: 18 agents swept the entire estate - 19 topic blueprints synthesized into one decisive BLUEPRINT.md. The canonical model is locked: the diamond, the equator, the half-gold/half-blue HB1000 marriage sphere, the three service rings, Dingo City at the base.

Phase 2 BUILDING NOW: 1 foundation builder + 12 parallel page-builders + 1 integrator constructing a 14-page web app:
The Model · Dingo Card 2D ⇆ 3D with the gold PTK heart · Dingo City · Command Deck (scale to 100) · The Nursery · North Star Builder · Do Before I Die · PTK dual ledger · Culture Chaser + 25 Timmyisms · Agent Fleet · The Doctrine · Learning Loop V13.0 · Build Your Own Life · the live Feed.

Seeded 100% real: ~99 actual initiatives, 40 scored Cloud Butterflies, the 3 live Dingo cards, both AI Research briefings. No lorem ipsum anywhere.
cards.caption: The soul rule, printed in the app chrome: 'The Dingo Card IS the operating system. Everything else is a field on it, a feed into it, or a score from it.' - 'Ship it ugly. Use it daily. Success = the card was used yesterday.'
